ab: cyan maki muyax Lawa?
en: A: Is Lawa at home?

ab: nyan maki muyax hiya, wah miyuk cka.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: cyan maki muyax Labi?
en: A: Is Labi at home?

ab: ini aki muyax hiya, maki nanu iyaw su?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: ima qaca?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: yutas, kingan ga Pisuy, wahi cikay blihun su ha.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Pisuy, please open the door.

ab: ima isu?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Yabun, kingan ga Macyan, nyan cu mwah msqun mcisan isu la.
en: A: Yabun, I’m Macyan, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: bsyaq misu ini ktali la.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: uya wa! llungun misu calay. uwah mcisan ha!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: tama ha, nbux ocya ha.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: mhway su.
en: A: Thank you.

ab: nbux ocya ha.
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: talagay kinblaq buxun ocya mamu wa.
en: A: Your tea is delicious.

ab: uwah ha, niqa ta qenan ha!
en: B: Let’s eat peaches!

ab: uya ga! talagay kinblaq ktalan qenan qani.
ch: B:好喔!這些桃子看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These peaches look great.

ab: blaq niqun qenan qani ga?
en: B: Are the peaches good?

ab: uya, lbing ru blaq calay niqun.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: masoq phapuy k’abi yaya mu la, wah maniq n’os ha!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: uya ga, haqa cu mema qba ha.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: lokah maniq, wali su cquliq.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: piyux calay wal mu niqun la, ktngi cu calay la.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: lokah maniq ga, laxi kcayux.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: wa, blaq calay niqun nhapuy mamu.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: musa cu la, mwaha cu ktayux isu babaw nya loyi.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: uya, sgagay ta la.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: mnkun calay la, musa cu muyax la.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: uwah mcisan babaw nya loyi ay!
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: thway musa su ay.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: uya, uka iyaw su ga, uwah mcisan muyax mu.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
